/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG "CMakeFiles/odv-tests.dir/odv-tests_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/odv-tests.dir/smoke.cpp.o" -o odv-tests  ../core/libodv-core.a /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6Network.so.6.4.2 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6Concurrent.so.6.4.2 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6Core.so.6.4.2 -lutil
